title: Assistant Store Manager - Evok - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Evok - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!
